ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the customer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the customer */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the customer */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of residence of the customer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Full address of the customer */,
  "reg_date" TEXT /* Date the customer registered */,
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subscription plan chosen by the customer */,
  "churn_date" TEXT /* Date the customer churned (if applicable) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date of the customer */,
  "referral_code" TEXT /* Unique referral code for the customer */,
  "referrer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who referred this customer (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_plan_id FOREIGN KEY ("plan_id") REFERENCES plans ("plan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_city FOREIGN KEY ("city") REFERENCES cities ("city_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "plans" (
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each plan */,
  "plan_name" TEXT /* Name of the plan */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the plan */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the plan */,
  "max_users" INTEGER /* Maximum number of users allowed under the plan */,
  "features" TEXT /* Features included in the plan */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the plan (e.g., monthly, yearly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the city is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the city is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the city */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "referrals" (
  "referral_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each referral */,
  "referrer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who referred */,
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who was referred */,
  "referral_date" TEXT /* Date of the referral */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the referral (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("referral_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_referrals_referrer_id FOREIGN KEY ("referrer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_referrals_referee_id FOREIGN KEY ("referee_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subscriptions" (
  "subscription_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subscription */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who holds the subscription */,
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the plan subscribed to */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the subscription */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the subscription (if applicable) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the subscription (e.g., active, inactive, expired) */,
  "renewal_date" TEXT /* Date when the subscription is due for renewal */,
  "auto_renew" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the subscription is set to auto-renew */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subscription_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subscriptions_plan_id FOREIGN KEY ("plan_id") REFERENCES plans ("plan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subscriptions_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "subscription_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subscription being paid for */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Transaction ID for tracking payments */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_subscription_id FOREIGN KEY ("subscription_id") REFERENCES subscriptions ("subscription_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "churn_rates" (
  "churn_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each churn event */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who churned */,
  "churn_date" TEXT /* Date the customer churned */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for churning (if applicable) */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Feedback or comments from the customer regarding their churn */,
  "follow_up" INTEGER /* Indicates whether a follow-up action has been taken */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("churn_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_churn_rates_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics entry */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer being analyzed */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city where the customer resides */,
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the plan subscribed to */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the analysis period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the analysis period */,
  "metric" TEXT /* Specific metric being analyzed (e.g., churn rate, retention rate) */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the metric */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., internal, external) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_plan_id FOREIGN KEY ("plan_id") REFERENCES plans ("plan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analytics entry the report is based on */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., churn rate, customer demographics) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., generated, reviewed, published) */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report findings */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_analytics_id FOREIGN KEY ("analytics_id") REFERENCES analytics ("analytics_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of the access event */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, report generation) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session (in seconds) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
